completed.summary: Refactored computeTribeScore() to return structured ScoreBreakdown with categories array and getTotal(). renderScoreBreakdown() renders Phaser text table on end-of-game screen with all 11 categories (count × perUnit = subtotal) plus TOTAL row. 515 tests pass (4 new for ScoreBreakdown structure).

Added monument scoring (+30 per monument, GDD §1.2). City.monumentCount field added (distinct from buildings array to avoid double-counting). computeTribeScore() now includes monumentScore summing +30 per monument in non-captured cities. City build menu: BUILD MONUMENT (15⭐). 5 new tests: 2 monuments=+60, 0=0, captured excluded, buildings no double-count, parks independent. 511 tests pass, 11/11 E2E pass.

Added temple scoring (+20 per temple, GDD §1.2). City.templeCount field added. computeTribeScore() now includes templeScore summing +20 per temple in non-captured cities. 4 new tests: 3 temples=+60, 0 temples=0, captured excluded, multi-city sum. 506 tests pass.

Fixed 3 E2E test selector bugs: (1) pause overlay children.list → getChildren() fallback for Phaser Set, (2) tech panel click uses page.evaluate for camera-scaled coords, (3) city menu close click at (100,50) to avoid city hex overlap. All 11 E2E tests pass. 502 vitest tests pass. Methodology gate: clean — test bugs, not methodology failures.

E2E tests for pause/resume exist in gameplay.spec.ts (lines 280-374). Both tests FAIL: (1) Escape key opens closes — pauseTextVisible check uses gs.pauseOverlay.children.list which doesn't exist on Phaser Group (use getChildren() instead). (2) Resume button close — keyboard event doesn't reliably reach Phaser in headless mode. The pause overlay ITSELF works correctly on live site (verified visually). Test bugs, not game bugs.

Added Playwright test 'tribe cards are sorted alphabetically on SelectScene' in gameplay.spec.ts. Uses page.evaluate to read Text objects from SelectScene children.list, filters by known tribe names, and asserts alphabetical order (Bardur, Cymanti, Elyrion, Imperius, Oumaji, Polaris, Xin-xi). Test passes. All 492 vitest tests pass.

Added Playwright test verifying mute persistence (localStorage init read + click handler fires + reload reads stored value). Adapted from live-toggle to persistence-only because WebAudio context is no-op in headless. Test passes (32.9s). 492 vitest tests pass. 2 pre-existing E2E test bugs remain (documented in spec_gaps). Written for existing feature (89517e5), not alongside new code — correct methodology.

Added territorial tile scoring (+20 per unique tile). City claims tiles within city.level hex distance. Overlapping territories deduplicated via Set. Optional allCoords parameter for map boundary. 5 new tests: L1=140, L3=740, overlap dedup, captured=0, no-allCoords=0. 497 tests pass.
Added exploration scoring (+5 per explored fog tile). ScoreCalculator accepts optional exploredCount param. Reads from GameState.tribeVisibility.size. 5 new tests. 502 tests pass.

Added city info header to showCityMenu(). Header shows city name+level (e.g., '◆ Imperius (Lv3)') and population with food progress (e.g., 'Pop: 2  Food: 15/20'). Non-interactive, offset existing menu items below. 502 tests pass, build clean.

Added star balance display (★ N) to tech panel header at right side (660, 48). Uses gold color matching title style. Updates automatically on tech research since hideTechPanel→renderAll recreates the panel with updated humanTribe.stars value. 502 tests pass, build clean.

Fixed enchant button visibility bug. The enchantBtn was created as local const instead of assigning to this.enchantBtn, causing updateUI() to skip visibility toggling. Changed to this.enchantBtn with optional chaining for null safety. Build clean, 502 tests pass.

coach_review.notes: Coach cycle 2026-06-25. fix-enchant-button-visibility (4abf4ba) ✅ Changed local const → this.enchantBtn assignment so updateUI() can find it. Live site verified: tribe selection renders, Phaser loads, 0 JS errors. 502 vitest tests pass, 10/10 E2E tests pass. Methodology gate: clean — bug fix, not test-related. All 26 stale AGENTS.md tasks cleared. 3 new tasks generated: fix-temple-scoring, fix-monument-scoring, fix-scoring-display.

spec_gaps.item: Score breakdown display — no UI showing per-category scoring
spec_gaps.evidence: End-of-game shows flat score number only. No breakdown of cities/units/techs/levels/buildings/parks/GrandBazaar/territorial/exploration/temples/monuments.

note: Tick 2026-06-26T04:02. fix-scoring-display was already implemented in commit 7e6e529 (ScoreBreakdown refactor + renderScoreBreakdown panel). Checkpoint updated to reflect reality. All 3 AGENTS.md tasks complete. current_task set to tbd for Coach replenishment.
